title: SubtlePBR
description: A semi-realistic 16x resource pack, enhancing the game *subtly*.
body:
Gallery

Website: [zaura.net](https://zaura.net) What is it?
SubtlePBR is a semi-realistic resourcepack, enhancing the game ever so *sublty* Features : - Uses Optifine for variations, and reduces the tiled look across minecraft. - Normal maps which provides bumps and height to the RP, making it feel real. - Specular maps that add reflections, and other features which enhance the pack. - Blocks are still identifiable even tho it is stylistic.

Other Info :
I have used Substance Designer for procedurally generating the textures, and then some Photoshop for some fine tweaks. Then all the nodes are merged using Pixelgraph for merging them onto a Normal Map and Specular Map. This version of SubtlePBR will always remain free and will be getting updates. You can support me here for a higher resolution version and faster updates. You are not allowed to redistribute SubtlePBR for any cause without permission.

This pack is supported by Bisect Hosting. Use code 'zaura' for 25% off the first month.


Join the Discord : https://discord.gg/UuE85pkfkc
Shaderlabs : https://discord.gg/RpzWN9S
Website : https://zaura.net/
Patreon : https://patreon.com/zaura
Personal Site: https://zoclhas.com/

Shader pack settings (Kappa/PT, Nostalgia/VX; Others : MollyVX, ApolloRT, Complementary/BSL/Astralex, DrDestens) :

  • Normalmap : ON
  • Resourcepack Reflections : ON
    • POM : ON
           -Samples : 128
    • Similar for other shaders aswell, but set the texture mode to LabPBR
